title: Chytraculia pallens

Chytraculia pallens is further classified as a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae. The species is known for its hairy stems and leaves, as well as its small, daisy-like flowers. Its classification is part of the broader system of plant taxonomy used to organize and understand plant diversity.
